title: Run a reproducible CPU-only fallback study
description: Use 2 CPU cores, 128 GB RAM, alpha_main=0.10, alpha_secondary=0.05, seeds [11,22,33], and save requirements, runtime budget, per-run configs, metrics, per-example CSVs, and log files.

title: Prepare synthetic, Anuran, and Mice with fixed splits
description: Regenerate or refresh processed data, standardize from training statistics only, impute Mice from training medians only, and write dataset and group summary artifacts including intersection groups and preprocessing statistics.

title: Run seed-11 pilot on synthetic and Anuran
description: Execute Split CP, flat GMM localization, batch multivalid thresholding, and hierarchical GMM localization. Record runtime, retained groups, active groups, and coverage, but keep the final note in fallback scope regardless of pilot outcome.

title: Run the full 3-dataset x 3-seed benchmark
description: Evaluate Split CP, class-conditional CP, kNN localization, flat GMM localization, batch multivalid thresholding, hierarchical GMM localization, and synthetic oracle RLCP where available.

title: Run flat-only, coarse-only, no-fallback, and uniform-overlap variants
description: Run all four hierarchical-localizer ablations on synthetic and Anuran for seeds [11,22,33].

title: Report mean, std, confidence intervals, and paired tests
description: Aggregate across seeds, save paired differences, run Wilcoxon signed-rank tests with Holm correction, and enforce the coverage filter for the CHiP-vs-batch set-size comparison.

title: Generate the missing figures
description: Create the coverage-vs-size figure with error bars, synthetic oracle groupwise comparison, Anuran taxonomy figure, runtime-budget figure, and fallback parity plot. Save plot data and figures to results/ and figures/.

title: Treat the outcome as a scoped negative-result note unless the fallback clearly wins
description: Do not make SPN/PC claims. Conclude only whether the hierarchical GMM fallback is better, tied, or worse than the flat GMM and batch multivalid baselines on fixed external groups.
